status: Post-hoc robustness amendment frozen after the v1 surface-form diagnostics and before computing the endpoints below
reason: The signed-relation graph survived the answer-order and surface-variant checks. These additional endpoints test whether the result depends on a single top-neighbor threshold or an overly permissive null that breaks the three surface variants belonging to one material case.
endpoints: Enumerate the exact 6^6 = 46,656 balanced outcome assignments across four material cases in each of six mechanism families, assigning the same permuted outcome to all three surface variants of a case. Report exact plus-one p-values and the exact-null mean for every fixed graph.

For every source prompt and each other surface variant, rank all three eligible prompts after excluding the same material case. Report top-1 accuracy, mean reciprocal rank, and pairwise ranking AUC for the unique same-outcome candidate.
Report leave-one-mechanism-out ranges for top-1 accuracy and ranking AUC.
Retain Jacobian, direct, raw, word-TF-IDF, character-TF-IDF, answer-order-only, and numeric-direction-oracle comparisons. The oracle remains a ceiling, not model evidence.
interpretation_rule: A robust relation result should have exact case-preserving p<0.05, ranking AUC above 0.5, and leave-one-mechanism-out values above chance. Equality of Jacobian, direct, and raw representations must remain explicit.
